title: XP tank V1.5
description: This datapack adds a new item: The XP Tank, to store and withdraw experience
body:
# XP TANK
This datapack adds a new item: The XP Tank

## USAGE
- Stand on the XP Tank to **deposit** your levels or shift + stand on the XP Tank to **withdraw** it
- To **remove** the XP Tank simply **right-click** it and you can pick it up. 

## Crafting
The crafting is on the gallery image

---

Have Fun and keep your levels safe!
